description_long: This is a decorative curtain set featuring two dark blue fabric panels adorned with a gold speckled pattern and a crescent moon motif. The panels are gathered and tied back with pink sashes, creating an open, inviting appearance. The curtain is mounted beneath a wooden pelmet or valance, which adds a structured and elegant touch to the top. The fabric appears soft and drapes naturally, with visible folds and creases that enhance its realism. The back of the curtain reveals the moon and stars design more prominently, while the front showcases the tied-back panels. The overall design suggests it is intended for a window in a domestic or urban residential setting.
description: A dark blue, gold-speckled curtain with a crescent moon motif, tied back with pink sashes and mounted under a wooden pelmet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curtain panels tied back with pink sashes and the wooden pelmet above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the curtain and the depth of the pelmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full moon and stars pattern on the curtain fabric and the structure of the pelmet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curtain's slim profile and the pink sash from a different angle.
attribute_fabric_pattern: dark blue with gold speckles and crescent moon motif
